title: Mqryo's Enchanted Books
description: A Resource Pack that adds a custom look to every enchanted book in the game!
body:
![Divisore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd984ed539088af048f8daac6003a2b2314749ff_0.webp)
![Enchanted Books Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba5462a756ce2445fd56366d8df978bd4210035b.png)

This resource pack adds a custom texture to every **Enchanted Book** in the game! The days of confusing chests are **finally over**!

**Version 1.4** features all the Books in **3D**! with **NO MODS** required!
*The Resource pack needs either Optifine or CIT Resewn in order to work, up to 1.21.4.
![Divisore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd984ed539088af048f8daac6003a2b2314749ff_0.webp)
![Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/496d8e075bcffd80633c767e32fc6d5226f69498.png)
![Book3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/accdbc8b51bc01b53e34ed50169eee706ccc343c.png)
![Armor3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6ba189fbd9d6d4e104d6e28f2f309300e6b25e8.png)
